message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state — close completed beads, advance in-progress work

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect the current state of the extension
conformance and theme system workstreams:

- bd-1fg (extension benchmarks): refresh closed timestamp after final
  verification pass confirmed cargo bench runs cleanly
- bd-2ce (negative conformance tests for denied capabilities): refresh
  closed timestamp after re-verification of policy enforcement tests
- bd-22p (theme system workstream): close — all child phases (theme
  loading, application, switching) are implemented and passing quality
  gates
- bd-1nq (conformance harness CI integration): advance to in_progress —
  harness tests being wired into cargo test default set and CI workflow
- bd-gz6 (E2E extension install/update workflow): advance to in_progress —
  install from local+remote package sources under active development

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
